name: PT Visi Media Asia Tbk
summary: PT Visi Media Asia Tbk operates as an integrated convergent media company in Indonesia. It operates through Advertisement and Non-Advertisement segments. The company operates tvOne, a news and sports television station; ANTV, which provides entertainment and lifestyle content, such as drama, comedy, animation, and other general entertainment programs for families and children; viva.co.id, an online news and entertainment portal; and Viva and tvOneConnect applications to access and engage with tvOne content. It also offers trading and business management consultancy services; office rental, property management, and other services; internet advertising and website services; multimedia and telecommunication services; general private television broadcasting services; television broadcasting industry services; and production house services. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Visi Media Asia Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Bakrie Global Ventura.
